server.title: GoodWe HK3000 Smart Meter
server.description:
Configure your smart meter connection.

**Before saving:**
1. Enter your meter's IP address below
2. Open the meter's web UI in a new tab: **http://<your-meter-ip>**
3. Navigate to **Mode → Server** and save the changes
4. Return here and save the configuration

The meter will then push real-time data to Home Assistant.

data.cloud_relay: Relay data to GoodWe cloud (keep SEMS app working)

data_description.cloud_relay: Forwards raw POSTGW packets to GoodWe cloud every 60 seconds
data_description.update_interval: How often HA refreshes sensor states (5-3600 seconds, default 20)

cloud_credentials.title: GoodWe Cloud Credentials
cloud_credentials.description: Enter your GoodWe SEMS account credentials to allow relaying meter data to the cloud.
